units.title: Sounds & Pronunciation
units.description: Czech alphabet, háček, čárka, first-syllable stress, problem sounds: ř, ě

units.title: Greetings & Introductions
units.description: Dobrý den, na shledanou, děkuji, prosím. Jmenuju se..., Jsem z...

units.title: Gender & Nominative Case
units.description: Masculine, feminine, neuter nouns. To je... identification pattern. Profession pairs.

units.title: Present Tense — být & mít
units.description: Conjugation of být (to be) and mít (to have). Negation and question forms.

units.title: Present Tense — Regular Verbs
units.description: Three conjugation classes: -át, -ít, -et/-ět. Daily activities, speaking, understanding.

units.title: Accusative Case
units.description: Direct objects: feminine -a→-u, masculine animate -a/-e, inanimate/neuter unchanged.

units.title: Pronouns & Possessives
units.description: Personal pronouns (já, ty, on...) and possessive adjectives (můj, tvůj, náš...). Gender agreement.

units.title: Family & Basic Descriptions
units.description: Family vocabulary, adjective-noun gender agreement, describing people and things.
